meaning: adj.未形成的,早期的,不完全的
examples: His dreams were senseless and inchoate.
This method also is inchoate when many what use.
But, we are right of overmatch restrict, still be in quite inchoate phase.
The opposition is inchoate, its leadership unknown, its aims so far vague and various.
The next step is to turn this inchoate movement into something more visible, concrete, and enabling.
